title: Elegant Happy 50th Anniversary White & Gold Latex Balloons (30cm) - Perfect for Golden Jubilee Celebrations - 5 ct
features: ELEGANT DESIGN: Beautifully crafted 50th anniversary balloons featuring a chic white and gold color scheme, perfect for complementing your golden jubilee celebration decor.
HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: Made of durable and eco-friendly latex material, these balloons can withstand the test of time, ensuring your celebration stays festive and vibrant.
IDEAL FOR GOLDEN JUBILEE CELEBRATIONS: Specifically designed to enhance your 50th anniversary party, whether it's a wedding, corporate event, or a milestone birthday celebration.
EASY TO INFLATE: Quick and hassle-free inflation, suitable for both helium and air, allowing you to effortlessly transform any space into a golden jubilee wonderland.

BOOST YOUR CELEBRATION: Get your pack of elegant happy 50th anniversary white & gold latex balloons and make a statement on this special occasion, creating long-lasting memories and marvelous photographs.
description: Product Description Celebrate a half century of wedded bliss with these eye-catching Pearlised Latex Happy 50th Anniversary Balloons. Featuring "Happy 50th Anniversary" text and a stars design printed all over, these white and gold party balloons are ideal for decorating a golden wedding anniversary party. Arrange them with foil balloons, a balloon weight and curling ribbon to create dazzling table centrepieces and balloon bouquets. Box Contains 1 x Pack of 5 Pearlised Latex Happy 50th Anniversary Balloons
